testdescription: When an employee triggers a high-risk action through a third-party agent plugin, the system must preserve a complete business-visible evidence chain from the original user to the final high-risk tool effect and bind that chain to the user's confirmation artifact.
failureError: AssertionError: category="Non_Repudiation_Gap" - Implicit_Contextvars_Missing - Runtime_Context_Spy_Missing - Runtime_Delegation_Attempt_Failed - Actor_Lineage_Incomplete - Confirmation_Artifact_Missing - Security_Center_Query_Missing - Evidence_Projection_Missing - Physical_Audit_Record_Missing - Confirmation_Record_Type_Missing - Confirmation_Payload_Hash_Missing - Prior_Hash_Link_Missing - Hash_Fields_Missing - Hash_Chain_Verifier_Missing - Continuity_Anchor_Missing - Human_Approval_Gate_Missing - Pre_Execution_Evidence_Write_Missing - Pre_Execution_Order_Assertion_Missing
stderr:
AssertionError: category="Non_Repudiation_Gap"
- Implicit_Contextvars_Missing: the live runtime artifacts do not yet prove the trusted user identity crossed the async boundary.
- Runtime_Context_Spy_Missing: no live runtime artifact shows the high-risk tool boundary reading user identity at execution time.
- Runtime_Delegation_Attempt_Failed: the live app did not accept the delegated high-risk console request in the isolated runtime.
- Actor_Lineage_Incomplete: the live app did not emit structured runtime evidence for every required business hop from employee to agent to plugin to tool.
- Confirmation_Artifact_Missing: the live app did not persist a durable confirmation digest in approval or trace artifacts under the isolated working directory.
- Security_Center_Query_Missing: the live app did not expose a queryable runtime trace for the attempted high-risk session.
- Evidence_Projection_Missing: the live app did not materialize one queryable runtime record that reconstructs employee -> agent -> plugin -> tool for the attempted session.
- Physical_Audit_Record_Missing: the isolated runtime did not write any disk artifact under inbox_traces for sec-e2e-024.
- Confirmation_Record_Type_Missing: the latest live runtime artifact does not expose a USER_CONFIRMATION record type for direct inspection.
- Confirmation_Payload_Hash_Missing: the latest live runtime artifact does not persist the confirmation artifact digest.
- Prior_Hash_Link_Missing: the latest live runtime artifact does not expose a prior-hash anchor for chain verification.
- Hash_Fields_Missing: the live runtime artifact does not yet expose both prior_hash and current_hash for integrity verification.
- Hash_Chain_Verifier_Missing: the isolated runtime does not yet emit any verifier result for the local audit chain.
- Continuity_Anchor_Missing: the isolated runtime does not yet emit a checkpoint or continuity anchor artifact for sec-e2e-024.
- Human_Approval_Gate_Missing: the live app did not emit a pending approval record for the attempted high-risk session.
- Pre_Execution_Evidence_Write_Missing: no durable confirmation record was observed in the live working directory during the attempted high-risk flow.
- Pre_Execution_Order_Assertion_Missing: the live runtime artifacts do not prove the atomic order 'store evidence, then release the high-risk tool'.

note: App subprocess started successfully (startup_error=None). All failure reasons are pure business-implementation gaps. Bootstrap blocker (segno) was resolved by installing the package. Coding/Repair must implement the audit foundation to make this test pass.
